full_text:
Zhu Yu 朱育
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhu Yu (朱育). Attempted to ease the worries of Zhongli Mu when Zhongli Mu did not receive expected awards. Zhu Yu was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
